---
title: "Other Mathematical Results"
---

## Lower Bound on $\operatorname{tr}(A^2)$

Since $\operatorname{tr}(A) = \sum_i \lambda_i = 1$ and $\operatorname{tr}(A^2) = \sum_i \lambda_i^2$, Jensen's inequality gives

$$
\operatorname{tr}(A^2) = \sum_i \lambda_i^2 \geq \frac{\left(\sum_i \lambda_i\right)^2}{n} = \frac{1}{n},
$$

with equality when all eigenvalues are equal. Thus the noise contribution $(\sigma_x^2\sigma_y^2 + \sigma_{xy}^2)\operatorname{tr}(A^2) = O(1/n)$, which shows the estimator is consistent.
